title: Can I automatically strip single quotes from names when automatically creating a contact from an email?
excerpt: When Monday automatically creates a Contact from an email it often include single quotes before and after the name - for example, ‘Michael Friedman’.  I want to automatically strip out the single quotes and just have Mic…

posts.author: mfriedma (Michael Friedman)
posts.cookedHtml: When Monday automatically creates a Contact from an email it often include single quotes before and after the name - for example, ‘Michael Friedman’. I want to automatically strip out the single quotes and just have Michael Friedman. Is this possible?
